title: API Customer Locations
subtitle: Aggressive parsing pipeline identifying untracked geographic leads.
about:
What is the API Pipeline?

A targeted scraping and aggregation service running asynchronously to index geographic coordinates against local registries, discovering high-value B2B targets missed by standard tools.

challenge.title: The Challenge: Manual Lead Generation
challenge.description: Finding businesses that do not have websites or robust digital footprints is nearly impossible through traditional search.

cards.title: Invisible Targets
cards.description: Valuable leads absent from Google, relying only on physical footprint.

cards.title: Rate Limiting
cards.description: Standard scraping rapidly triggers IP bans and bot-protection.

solution.title: Our Solution: Distributed Asynchronous Extraction
solution.description: A highly resilient grid of parsing scripts utilizing proxies to build massive structured lists from deeply unstructured map nodes.

features.title: Resilient Crawling
features.description: Evades generic bot blocks via organic traffic synthesis techniques.

features.title: Geocoding Unification
features.description: Normalizes completely fractured address layouts into strict JSON schemas.

categories.name: Scraping Logic
categories.description: BeautifulSoup and custom regex mechanics navigating chaotic DOM structures.

categories.name: Delivery APIs
categories.description: FastAPI providing blazingly fast websocket and REST endpoints to dump leads securely.

results.title: Massive Lead Gen
results.description: Sourced thousands of previously unreachable physical locations.

results.title: Clean Data Pipelining
results.description: Reduced manual data entry for the sales team by 100%.
